SEARCH

Uses of Class
cpdt.simulator.scenarios.Scenario

Packages that use Scenario
Package
Description
cpdt.simulator.engine
Provides the core simulation engine responsible for executing the chemical plant simulation.
cpdt.simulator.scenarios
Provides simulation scenarios that introduce predefined operating conditions and events into the chemical plant simulation.

  • Uses of Scenario in cpdt.simulator.engine

    Methods in cpdt.simulator.engine that return types with arguments of type Scenario
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Scenario>
    ScenarioEngine.getActiveScenarios()
    Returns all scenarios that are currently active.
    Methods in cpdt.simulator.engine with parameters of type Scenario
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ScenarioEngine.clearScenario(Scenario scenario)
    Deactivates an active scenario and allows it to complete any remaining recovery or cooldown behavior before removal.
    void
    ScenarioEngine.triggerScenario(Scenario scenario)
    Activates a scenario and begins tracking it for periodic updates.

  • Uses of Scenario in cpdt.simulator.scenarios

    Subclasses of Scenario in cpdt.simulator.scenarios
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    EquipmentFailureScenario
    Simulates the failure of an individual sensor device.
    class 
    FireScenario
    Simulates a fire emergency within a process area.
    class 
    GasLeakScenario
    Simulates a gradual hazardous gas leak within a process area.
    class 
    OverheatScenario
    Simulates a gradual temperature increase within a process area.
    class 
    OverpressureScenario
    Simulates a gradual pressure buildup within a process area.
